3232170.name: The PARADOGX Incident Soundtrack
3232170.description:
PARADOGX Official Soundtrack, Vol. 1 brings the game’s adaptive soundtrack to life as standalone tracks, reimagined for listening outside of gameplay.

Each piece captures the shifting atmosphere of PARADOGX, from the quiet tension of puzzle-solving moments to the energy of rhythmic encounters.

This remixed collection offers fans a fresh way to experience the game's musical world.
